Summary: V02 — Bootstrap NestJS app (CORS, helmet, versioning `/api/v1`, graceful shutdown)
Description:
# V02 — Bootstrap NestJS app (CORS, helmet, versioning `/api/v1`, graceful shutdown)

**Epic:** EP01  |  **Points:** 3  |  **Priority:** High

## 🎯 What to Build
Khởi tạo NestJS production-ready bootstrap với CORS env-whitelist, helmet, URI versioning, env validation Zod, graceful shutdown.

## 🛠 Implementation Tasks
- [ ] Tạo `apps/api/src/main.ts` với `NestFactory.create(AppModule, { bufferLogs: true })`
- [ ] Apply `helmet()`, `enableCors({ origin: env.CORS_ORIGINS.split(',') })`
- [ ] `app.setGlobalPrefix('api')` + `app.enableVersioning({ type: VersioningType.URI, defaultVersion: '1' })`
- [ ] `app.enableShutdownHooks()` + catch SIGTERM/SIGINT log gracefully
- [ ] Tạo `apps/api/src/common/config/app.config.ts` validate env qua Zod schema, throw nếu thiếu key
- [ ] Update `apps/api/src/app.module.ts` register `HealthModule`

## 📐 API Contract / Data Model
| Env | Required | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `PORT` | yes | 3000 |
| `NODE_ENV` | yes | development |
| `CORS_ORIGINS` | yes | `*` (dev only) |

## 📁 Files to Create / Modify
- `apps/api/src/main.ts`
- `apps/api/src/app.module.ts`
- `apps/api/src/common/config/app.config.ts`
- `apps/api/src/modules/health/health.module.ts`
- `apps/api/src/modules/health/health.controller.ts`

## 🔌 Libs / Dependencies
**npm packages (add if missing):**
- `@nestjs/core`
- `@nestjs/common`
- `helmet`
- `nestjs-pino`
- `zod`

**Prior videos (must be merged first):** V01

## ⚠️ Gotchas / Implementation Notes
- `app.enableCors()` PHẢI gọi trước route đăng ký để OPTIONS preflight work
- `bufferLogs: true` cần thiết để `nestjs-pino` capture early logs
- SIGTERM handler không được `process.exit()` thủ công, để `enableShutdownHooks` lo

## 🧪 Test Hints (cho dev viết unit test — KHÔNG phải QC test plan)
- Bootstrap không throw → server listen `PORT`
- `GET /api/v1/health` trả `{ ok: true, data: { status: 'ok' } }`
- Missing env `CORS_ORIGINS` → app throw at startup
- SIGTERM → exit code 0, log `'gracefully shutdown'`

## ✅ Definition of Done
- [ ] Implementation complete (files listed above)
- [ ] Unit tests cover happy path + 2+ edge cases (Vitest)
- [ ] Endpoint hiển thị ở `/api/docs` Swagger (nếu applicable)
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` exit 0
- [ ] `pnpm test` exit 0
- [ ] Self-review checklist done (no console.log, no TODO, no commented code)
- [ ] PR opened + reviewed

# V06 — Signup + email verification flow (MailPit dev, token TTL 24h)

**Epic:** EP02  |  **Points:** 5  |  **Priority:** High

## 🎯 What to Build
Implement signup endpoint cho 3 role + gửi email verify (MailPit), endpoint verify token, set `users.status='active'`.

- [ ] Định nghĩa `SignupDto` Zod: { email, password (min 8, mixed case), fullName, role: 'tutor'|'student' (admin do seeder tạo) }
- [ ] Implement `AuthService.signup(dto)`:
  - Check email duplicate → 409
  - Hash password bcrypt rounds 10
  - Insert `users` row status='pending_email_verify'
- [ ]   - Nếu role='tutor' → insert `tutor_profiles(userId, approveStatus='pending_admin_approve')`
- [ ]   - Nếu role='student' → insert `student_profiles(userId)`

- [ ] Implement `AuthService.verifyEmail(token)`:
  - Find by tokenHash, check not expired, not used
- [ ]   - Set `users.status='active'`, mark token used
- [ ] Endpoints: `POST /api/v1/auth/signup`, `POST /api/v1/auth/verify-email`

| Endpoint | Body | Success | Errors |

| POST /auth/signup | { email, password, fullName, role } | 201 { userId } + email sent | 400 weak password / 409 email exists |

Summary: V08 — Refresh token rotation + revoke on logout (whitelist pattern)
Description:
# V08 — Refresh token rotation + revoke on logout (whitelist pattern)

**Epic:** EP02  |  **Points:** 5  |  **Priority:** High

## 🎯 What to Build
Implement `POST /auth/refresh` rotation pattern + `POST /auth/logout` revoke. Whitelist refresh tokens trong DB.

## 🛠 Implementation Tasks
- [ ] Create migration / schema `refresh_tokens(id, userId, tokenHash UQ, expiresAt, revokedAt nullable, replacedByTokenId nullable, createdAt)`
- [ ] Implement `RefreshTokenService.issue(userId)`:
  - Gen random 64-byte hex, hash SHA-256
  - Insert row expiresAt = now+7days
- [ ]   - Return plain token
- [ ] Implement `RefreshTokenService.rotate(plainToken)`:
  - Find by tokenHash + check not expired + not revoked
- [ ]   - Mark old token revoked + replacedByTokenId
- [ ]   - Issue new token (call .issue)
- [ ]   - DETECT REPLAY: nếu token đã revoked → 401 + log SECURITY_EVENT (revoke all user's tokens)
- [ ] Implement `AuthService.logout(userId)`: mark all active refresh tokens revoked
- [ ] Endpoints: `POST /api/v1/auth/refresh`, `POST /api/v1/auth/logout`

## 📐 API Contract / Data Model
| Endpoint | Body | Success | Errors |
|---|---|---|---|
| POST /auth/refresh | { refreshToken } | 200 { accessToken, refreshToken (new) } | 401 expired/invalid/revoked |
| POST /auth/logout | (auth header) | 204 | 401 not authed |

## 📁 Files to Create / Modify
- `apps/api/src/modules/auth/refresh-token.service.ts`
- `apps/api/src/modules/auth/repositories/refresh-token.repository.ts`
- `apps/api/src/modules/auth/dto/refresh.dto.ts`

**npm packages (add if missing):**
- `@nestjs/jwt`

**Prior videos (must be merged first):** V07

## 🧾 Reference (Excel QC — info only, dev impl theo AC)
Excel reference (info): `Logout` (Admin/Tutor/Student/Parent).

## ⚠️ Gotchas / Implementation Notes
- Rotation pattern: dùng refresh 1 lần xong revoke; cấp mới. Phát hiện 1 token dùng 2 lần = bị steal → revoke all
- TTL refresh 7 ngày env `JWT_REFRESH_TTL`
- Logout từ device A KHÔNG ảnh hưởng device B (mỗi device 1 refresh token)

## 🧪 Test Hints (cho dev viết unit test — KHÔNG phải QC test plan)
- Refresh happy path → 200 token mới, token cũ marked revoked
- Dùng cùng refresh token lần 2 → 401 + log replay event + tất cả refresh tokens user bị revoke
- Expired refresh → 401
- Logout → mọi refresh token user revoked

# V09 — JWT auth guard + `@Roles(...)` role guard + `@CurrentUser()` decorator

**Epic:** EP02  |  **Points:** 3  |  **Priority:** High

## 🎯 What to Build
Implement global JWT auth guard + role-based access control với `@Roles('admin','tutor','student')` decorator.

## 🛠 Implementation Tasks
- [ ] Implement `JwtAuthGuard extends AuthGuard('jwt')`:
  - Check route metadata `@Public()` → skip auth
  - Else parse Bearer header, verify JWT, attach `request.user`
- [ ] Define `JwtStrategy extends PassportStrategy(Strategy)`:
  - secret từ env, algorithm 'HS256', extract từ AuthorizationHeader
- [ ]   - `validate(payload) → { id, role, email }`
- [ ] Implement `RolesGuard implements CanActivate`:
  - Đọc `@Roles(...)` metadata từ handler/class
- [ ]   - Compare với `request.user.role` → throw `ForbiddenException` nếu không match
- [ ] Decorators:
  - `@Public()` → SetMetadata('isPublic', true)
- [ ]   - `@Roles(...roles: UserRole[])` → SetMetadata('roles', roles)
- [ ]   - `@CurrentUser()` → createParamDecorator inject `request.user`
- [ ] Register global: `app.useGlobalGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard)`

## 📐 API Contract / Data Model
**Sample:**
```ts
@Post('users')
@Roles('admin')
createUser(@CurrentUser() admin: User, @ZodBody(dto) body) {}
```

- `apps/api/src/common/guards/roles.guard.ts`

# V11 — Tutor profile CRUD + Hanah approval workflow (pending → approved/rejected)

**Epic:** EP03  |  **Points:** 5  |  **Priority:** High

## 🎯 What to Build
Tutor self-CRUD profile + Hanah approve/reject endpoint với state machine `pending_admin_approve → approved | rejected → suspended`.

## 🛠 Implementation Tasks
- [ ] Endpoint `GET /api/v1/tutors/:id` public profile (bio + subjects + levels + qualifications)
- [ ] Endpoint `PATCH /api/v1/tutors/me` @Roles('tutor') Tutor update bio

- [ ] Endpoint `POST /api/v1/admin/tutors/:id/suspend` body { reason } → status='suspended'
- [ ] State machine class `TutorApprovalState`: ALLOWED transitions = [(pending,approved), (pending,rejected), (rejected,pending), (approved,suspended), (suspended,approved)]

| Trigger | from | to |
|---|---|---|
| Signup | — | pending_admin_approve |
| Hanah approve | pending | approved |
| Hanah reject | pending | rejected |

| Hanah suspend | approved | suspended |
| Hanah unsuspend | suspended | approved |

# V20 — Course approval workflow + state machine + audit log

**Epic:** EP06  |  **Points:** 5  |  **Priority:** High

## 🎯 What to Build
Implement state machine `draft → pending_approval → published | rejected → archived` + Hanah approve/reject endpoint + audit log mọi transition.

## 🛠 Implementation Tasks
- [ ] Class `CourseState` export ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS list
- [ ] Function `assertTransition(from, to)` throw `ConflictException` nếu invalid
- [ ] Endpoint `POST /api/v1/tutors/me/courses/:id/submit` @Roles('tutor') → status='pending_approval'
- [ ] Endpoint `POST /api/v1/admin/courses/:id/approve` @Roles('admin') → status='published'
- [ ] Endpoint `POST /api/v1/admin/courses/:id/reject` @Roles('admin') body { reason } → status='rejected', lưu reason field
- [ ] Endpoint `POST /api/v1/tutors/me/courses/:id/archive` @Roles('tutor') → status='archived' (chỉ từ 'published')
- [ ] Guard: Tutor không thể edit course đang `pending_approval` hoặc `published` (chỉ archive)
- [ ] Mọi transition write `audit_logs(actorId, action='course.<state>', entityType='course', entityId, payload)`

## 📐 API Contract / Data Model
| From | To | Trigger |
|---|---|---|
| draft | pending_approval | Tutor submit |
| pending_approval | published | Hanah approve |
| pending_approval | rejected | Hanah reject |
| rejected | pending_approval | Tutor resubmit |
| published | archived | Tutor archive |
| archived | (terminal) | — |

## 📁 Files to Create / Modify
- `apps/api/src/modules/courses/course-approval.controller.ts`

Summary: V22 — Lesson progress tracking (composite PK, auto complete khi watchedSec ≥ 90%)
Description:
# V22 — Lesson progress tracking (composite PK, auto complete khi watchedSec ≥ 90%)

**Epic:** EP07  |  **Points:** 3  |  **Priority:** Medium

## 🎯 What to Build
Track lesson progress: `(enrollmentId, lessonId)` composite PK, upsert pattern. Auto mark completedAt khi watched ≥ 90%.

## 🛠 Implementation Tasks
- [ ] Schema `lesson_progress(enrollmentId, lessonId, watchedSec, completedAt nullable)` PK composite
- [ ] Endpoint `POST /api/v1/enrollments/:enrollmentId/lessons/:lessonId/progress` body { watchedSec }
- [ ]   - Upsert (insert or update)
- [ ]   - Nếu `watchedSec >= lesson.durationSec * 0.9` set `completedAt = now()`
- [ ]   - Trigger update `course_enrollments.progressPercent`:
     `(count lessons với completedAt / total lessons in course) * 100`
- [ ] Endpoint `GET /api/v1/enrollments/:id/progress` returns:
  ```
  { courseId, progressPercent, lessons: [{ lessonId, title, watchedSec, completedAt }] }
  ```
- [ ] Guard: student chỉ update progress của enrollment của mình

## 📐 API Contract / Data Model
**Auto-complete rule:** `completedAt = now()` once `watchedSec >= durationSec * 0.9`. Re-call với watchedSec thấp hơn KHÔNG revert completedAt.

## 📁 Files to Create / Modify
- `apps/api/src/modules/enrollments/lesson-progress.controller.ts`
- `apps/api/src/modules/enrollments/lesson-progress.service.ts`

## 🔌 Libs / Dependencies
**npm packages (add if missing):**
(không thêm dependency mới)

**Prior videos (must be merged first):** V17, V21

## ⚠️ Gotchas / Implementation Notes
- Upsert ON CONFLICT (Prisma `upsert`)
- progressPercent recompute trong cùng transaction để tránh race
- KHÔNG cho phép watchedSec > durationSec (clamp)

## 🧪 Test Hints (cho dev viết unit test — KHÔNG phải QC test plan)

- Update lại watchedSec=50 → completedAt giữ nguyên

# V27 — Combo booking — RRULE generate N child bookings (3 buổi/tuần × 1-2 tháng)

**Epic:** EP09  |  **Points:** 8  |  **Priority:** High

## 🎯 What to Build
Combo booking: Student chọn 3 slot/tuần + numMonths (1 hoặc 2). Server gen parent + N child bookings theo RRULE.

## 🛠 Implementation Tasks
- [ ] DTO `CreateComboBookingDto`: { subjectId, levelId, weeklySlots (3 phần tử: { dayOfWeek, startTime, durationHr }), numMonths (1|2), startWeekDate (ISO date Monday), orderId }
- [ ] Endpoint `POST /api/v1/students/me/bookings/combo`
- [ ] Logic:
  - Validate weeklySlots.length === 3, all durationHr ∈ [1.5, 2]
- [ ]   - Validate numMonths ∈ [1, 2]
- [ ]   - Validate order: type='session_combo', paid, link match
- [ ]   - Insert parent `session_bookings(status='pending_assign', parentBookingId=null)`
- [ ]   - Generate child bookings:
     - totalChildren = 3 × 4 × numMonths (4 tuần/tháng)
- [ ]      - mỗi child startAt = startWeekDate + weekOffset days + slot.dayOfWeek + slot.startTime
- [ ]      - Insert N rows `(parentBookingId=parent.id, status='pending_assign')`
- [ ]   - Tất cả children inherit parent's tutorId (null until assigned ở V31)

## 📐 API Contract / Data Model
**Sample input:**
```json
{
  "weeklySlots": [
    { "dayOfWeek": 1, "startTime": "19:00", "durationHr": 2 },
    { "dayOfWeek": 3, "startTime": "19:00", "durationHr": 2 },
    { "dayOfWeek": 5, "startTime": "19:00", "durationHr": 2 }
  ],
  "numMonths": 2,
  "startWeekDate": "2026-06-01"
}
```
→ 24 child bookings (3 × 4 × 2).

## 📁 Files to Create / Modify
- `apps/api/src/modules/sessions/combo-booking.service.ts`
- `apps/api/src/common/utils/rrule.ts`

**Prior videos (must be merged first):** V26

## ⚠️ Gotchas / Implementation Notes
- Toàn bộ insert (parent + N child) trong 1 transaction
- Cascade rule: cancel parent → cancel all child (status='pending_assign'|'assigned'|'confirmed')
- 4 tuần/tháng = approximation (mỗi tháng 28 ngày × 1-2 = 12-24 buổi)

## 🧪 Test Hints (cho dev viết unit test — KHÔNG phải QC test plan)

- 2 tháng → 24 children

# V28 — Booking state machine + transition assertion + audit log

**Epic:** EP09  |  **Points:** 5  |  **Priority:** High

## 🎯 What to Build
Define ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS cho session_bookings; helper `assertTransition`; mọi transition write audit log.

## 🛠 Implementation Tasks
- [ ] File `booking-state.ts` export:
```ts
export const BOOKING_STATES = ['created','pending_assign','assigned','confirmed','in_progress','completed','cancelled','no_show'] as const;
export const ALLOWED: Array<{from,to}> = [...]
```
- [ ] Function `assertTransition(from, to)` throw `ConflictException('INVALID_TRANSITION')` nếu (from,to) không trong ALLOWED
- [ ] Service `BookingTransitionService.transition(bookingId, to, opts)`:
  - Lock row (`SELECT ... FOR UPDATE` trong transaction)
- [ ]   - Read current status
- [ ]   - Call assertTransition
- [ ]   - Update + write audit log
- [ ] Combo parent state machine: same except KHÔNG có 'in_progress'/'completed' (parent là logical container)

## 📐 API Contract / Data Model
**ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS:**
```
created → pending_assign
pending_assign → assigned | cancelled
assigned → confirmed | pending_assign (re-assign) | cancelled
confirmed → in_progress | cancelled | no_show
in_progress → completed
(completed, cancelled, no_show terminal)
```

## 📁 Files to Create / Modify
- `apps/api/src/modules/sessions/booking-state.ts`
- `apps/api/src/modules/sessions/booking-transitions.service.ts`

(không thêm dependency mới)

**Prior videos (must be merged first):** V27

## ⚠️ Gotchas / Implementation Notes
- `SELECT FOR UPDATE` chống race condition khi 2 actor transition cùng row
- assertTransition là pure func, dễ test

## 🧪 Test Hints (cho dev viết unit test — KHÔNG phải QC test plan)

# V30 — Eligible-tutor SQL filter (rảnh + chuyên môn + level + không double-book)

**Epic:** EP10  |  **Points:** 8  |  **Priority:** High

## 🎯 What to Build
Build complex SQL query trả Tutor candidates cho 1 booking pending_assign. 4 conditions theo planK23 §7.

## 🛠 Implementation Tasks
- [ ] Endpoint `GET /api/v1/admin/bookings/:id/eligible-tutors` @Roles('admin')
- [ ] Build query đúng theo `planK23.md §7`:
  1. tutor.approveStatus='approved' AND user.status='active'
  2. EXISTS tutor_availability matching booking slot (dayOfWeek, time range, validFrom/To)
- [ ]   3. NOT EXISTS double-book (tsrange overlap với status ∈ [assigned, confirmed, in_progress])
- [ ]   4. EXISTS course published OR EXISTS tutor_subjects với subjectId match
- [ ]   5. EXISTS tutor_levels với levelId match
- [ ] Sort: published_course_count DESC, avg_rating DESC
- [ ] Response: paginated list { id, fullName, avatarUrl, bio, subjectsTeaching: [], avgRating, publishedCoursesCount }

## 📐 API Contract / Data Model
**Critical SQL filter:** Reference `planK23.md §7`. Test với 5 scenarios:
- Tutor rảnh nhưng không có subject → exclude
- Có subject nhưng busy → exclude
- Có cả nhưng wrong level → exclude
- Đủ điều kiện → include
- Đã có pending booking khác (chưa confirmed) → vẫn include (pending_assign không lock)

## 📁 Files to Create / Modify
- `apps/api/src/modules/hanah-assign/eligible-tutors.service.ts`

# V31 — Hanah assign endpoint (PUT idempotent + cascade combo + notify Tutor)

**Epic:** EP10  |  **Points:** 5  |  **Priority:** High

## 🎯 What to Build
Hanah chọn 1 Tutor cho booking pending_assign. PUT semantics (idempotent). Combo → áp cho parent + all children.

- [ ] Logic:
  - Verify booking status ∈ [pending_assign, assigned]
- [ ]   - Verify tutorId ∈ eligible list (call V30 service)
- [ ]   - Idempotent:
     - Nếu đã assigned cùng tutorId → 200 no-op
- [ ]      - Nếu assigned khác tutor và status='assigned' (chưa accept) → cho phép re-assign
- [ ]      - Nếu status='confirmed' (Tutor đã accept) → 409 ALREADY_CONFIRMED
- [ ]   - Combo parent: cascade set tutorId cho all child status ∈ [pending_assign, assigned]
- [ ]   - Transition status → 'assigned' (parent + children)
- [ ]   - Trigger notification 'booking-assigned' tới Tutor (V47)

**Semantics:** PUT vì idempotent — re-PUT cùng tutorId không tạo side effect mới.

# V32 — Tutor accept/decline + cascade combo + reassign on decline

**Epic:** EP10  |  **Points:** 5  |  **Priority:** High

## 🎯 What to Build
Tutor accept booking → status='confirmed' + sinh meetingRoomName (V33 trigger). Decline → revert pending_assign cascade.

## 🛠 Implementation Tasks

- [ ]   - Transition → 'confirmed'
- [ ]   - Trigger `MeetingRoomService.generate(bookingId)` (V33)
- [ ]   - Combo: cascade confirm all child + sinh meetingRoomName cho mỗi child
- [ ] Endpoint `POST /api/v1/tutors/me/bookings/:id/decline` body { reason }
- [ ]   - Transition → 'pending_assign', set tutorId=null
- [ ]   - Combo parent decline: cascade revert all child
- [ ]   - Notify Hanah (notification 'tutor-declined')
- [ ]   - Audit log reason

## 📐 API Contract / Data Model
**Combo handling:** Tutor accept parent → tự động accept all children. Decline tương tự.

## 📁 Files to Create / Modify

## ⚠️ Gotchas / Implementation Notes
- meetingRoomName được sinh ở moment accept (V33 service), KHÔNG khi assigned

# V33 — Sinh meetingRoomName deterministic + URL config + `/join` redirect endpoint

**Epic:** EP11  |  **Points:** 5  |  **Priority:** High

## 🎯 What to Build
Server sinh `meetingRoomName='tutor365-<bookingId>'` deterministic khi Tutor accept. Build join URL với security config. Endpoint `/sessions/:id/join` redirect.

## 🛠 Implementation Tasks
- [ ] Service `MeetingRoomService.generate(bookingId)`:
```ts
async generate(bookingId: string) {
  const roomName = `tutor365-${bookingId}`;
  await this.bookingsRepo.update(bookingId, { meetingRoomName: roomName });
  return { roomName, joinUrl: this.buildUrl(roomName) };
}
private buildUrl(roomName: string) {
  const hash = new URLSearchParams({
    'config.prejoinPageEnabled': 'false',
    'config.startWithAudioMuted': 'true',
  }).toString();
  return `https://meet.jit.si/${roomName}#${hash}`;
}
```
- [ ] Persist `meetingRoomName` UQ trong `session_bookings`
- [ ] Endpoint `GET /api/v1/sessions/:id/join`:
  - Verify user ∈ { booking.student, booking.tutor, admin }
- [ ]   - Verify status ∈ [confirmed, in_progress]
- [ ]   - HTTP 302 redirect → joinUrl

## 📐 API Contract / Data Model
**URL format:** `https://meet.jit.si/tutor365-{bookingId}#config.prejoinPageEnabled=false&config.startWithAudioMuted=true`

**Authorization:**

| Student của booking | ✅ |

Description:
# V34 — Attendance POST + cron reconciliation (assigned → in_progress → completed | no_show)

**Epic:** EP11  |  **Points:** 8  |  **Priority:** High

## 🎯 What to Build
Frontend nhúng Jitsi iframe → External API events → POST attendance. Cron 5'/lần reconcile booking status dựa attendance + time.

## 🛠 Implementation Tasks
- [ ] Endpoint `POST /api/v1/sessions/:id/attendances` body { event: 'joined'|'left', timestamp ISO }
- [ ]   - Authorization: chỉ user ∈ session
- [ ]   - Upsert `session_attendances(bookingId, userId)` PK composite — set joinedAt hoặc leftAt
- [ ] Cron `@Cron('*/5 * * * *')` `BookingReconciliationCron`:
- [ ]   - Rule 1: bookings status='confirmed' AND có ≥1 attendance.joinedAt → status='in_progress'
- [ ]   - Rule 2: bookings status='in_progress' AND now > startAt + durationHr → status='completed'
- [ ]   - Rule 3: bookings status='confirmed' AND now > startAt + 15min AND 0 attendance → status='no_show'
- [ ] Frontend snippet doc (`docs/course2-3/jitsi-iframe-integration.md`):
```js
const api = new JitsiMeetExternalAPI(domain, options);
api.on('videoConferenceJoined', () => fetch('/sessions/:id/attendances', {
  method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify({ event: 'joined', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() })
}));
api.on('videoConferenceLeft', () => fetch(...));
```

## 📐 API Contract / Data Model
**Cron logic table:**
| Current | Condition | New status |
|---|---|---|
| confirmed | có attendance.joinedAt | in_progress |
| in_progress | now > startAt+durationHr | completed |
| confirmed | now > startAt+15min AND no attendance | no_show |

## 📁 Files to Create / Modify
- `apps/api/src/modules/sessions/attendances.controller.ts`
- `apps/api/src/modules/sessions/attendances.service.ts`

- `docs/course2-3/jitsi-iframe-integration.md`

Description:
# V37 — iCal `.ics` feed RFC 5545 + feed token auth (subscribable Google/Apple)

**Epic:** EP12  |  **Points:** 5  |  **Priority:** Medium

## 🎯 What to Build
iCal feed cho user (token-based auth, không phải JWT) — subscribable bằng Google Calendar / Apple Calendar.

## 🛠 Implementation Tasks
- [ ] Endpoint `POST /api/v1/users/me/ical-token` create feed token (one per user, regen revoke old)
- [ ] Schema `feed_tokens(userId UQ, tokenHash, createdAt)`
- [ ] Endpoint `GET /api/v1/users/:userId/sessions.ics?token=<feedToken>` (no JWT auth, token-based)
- [ ] Logic:
  - Verify token via SHA-256 hash match
- [ ]   - Build VCALENDAR with `ical-generator`
- [ ]   - VEVENT cho mỗi session next 60 ngày
- [ ]   - Fields: UID=booking.id, DTSTART, DTEND, SUMMARY='Tutor365: <subject> with <tutorName>', LOCATION=joinUrl, DESCRIPTION, STATUS
- [ ]   - STATUS: CONFIRMED hoặc CANCELLED

## 📐 API Contract / Data Model
**Why token instead of JWT:** Apple Calendar / Google Calendar không gửi Bearer header khi subscribe — chỉ HTTP GET. Token trong query param là chuẩn pattern.

**VEVENT mapping:**
| iCal | Source |
|---|---|
| UID | `tutor365-{bookingId}@tutor365.com` |
| DTSTART | booking.startAt |
| DTEND | startAt + durationHr |
| SUMMARY | 'Tutor365: {subject} với {tutorName}' |
| LOCATION | joinUrl |
| STATUS | CONFIRMED/CANCELLED |

## 📁 Files to Create / Modify
- `apps/api/src/modules/sessions/ical.controller.ts`

     - course: courses.price (giá Tutor đặt)

Summary: V41 — IPN webhook (CRITICAL) — verify + idempotent + DB transaction + grant entitlement
Description:
# V41 — IPN webhook (CRITICAL) — verify + idempotent + DB transaction + grant entitlement

**Epic:** EP13  |  **Points:** 13  |  **Priority:** Highest

## 🎯 What to Build
VNPay IPN webhook — source of truth duy nhất cho payment status. Verify hash, idempotent insert payment, DB transaction wrap, grant entitlement (call V21/V26/V27).

## 🛠 Implementation Tasks
- [ ] Endpoint `POST /api/v1/payments/vnpay/ipn` no JWT (verify by hash), accept query params hoặc body
- [ ] Response format VNPay yêu cầu: `{ RspCode: '...', Message: '...' }`
- [ ] Logic (mọi step return VNPay-format response):
  1. Verify vnp_SecureHash → fail → return { RspCode: '97', Message: 'Invalid signature' }
- [ ]   2. Find order by vnp_TxnRef → not found → { RspCode: '01' }
- [ ]   3. Compare amount (vnp_Amount / 100 vs order.total) → mismatch → { RspCode: '04' }
- [ ]   4. Check order.status:
     - 'paid' → { RspCode: '02', Message: 'Already paid' } IDEMPOTENT
- [ ]      - 'expired'/'failed' → { RspCode: '02' }
- [ ]      - 'pending' → proceed
- [ ]   5. DB transaction:
     - Insert `payments(orderId, vnpTransactionNo UQ, vnpResponseCode, amount, bankCode, payDate, rawIpnPayload)` — UQ chặn duplicate
- [ ]      - Nếu vnp_ResponseCode === '00':
        - Update order: status='paid', paidAt=now
- [ ]         - Grant entitlement theo order.type:
- [ ]            - course: `EntitlementGrantService.grantCourseEnrollment(...)` (V21)
- [ ]            - session_single: link order tới booking (V26)
- [ ]            - session_combo: link order tới parent booking (V27)
- [ ]      - Else: order.status='failed'
- [ ]   6. Return { RspCode: '00', Message: 'Confirm Success' }

## 📐 API Contract / Data Model
**VNPay RspCode contract:**
| Code | Meaning |
|---|---|
| 00 | Confirm Success |
| 01 | Order not found |
| 02 | Order already updated |
| 04 | Invalid amount |
| 97 | Invalid signature |
| 99 | Unknown error |

## 📁 Files to Create / Modify
- `apps/api/src/modules/payments/ipn.controller.ts`
- `apps/api/src/modules/payments/ipn.service.ts`
- `apps/api/src/modules/payments/entitlement-grant.service.ts`

## 🔌 Libs / Dependencies

(không thêm dependency mới)

**Prior videos (must be merged first):** V40, V21, V26, V27

Excel reference (info): `Student.Cart.Student checkout successfully / failed`.

## ⚠️ Gotchas / Implementation Notes
- TUYỆT ĐỐI idempotent — gửi cùng IPN payload 3 lần phải tạo CHỈ 1 payment + 1 enrollment
- UQ `payments.vnp_transaction_no` là cơ chế chống duplicate ở DB level
- DB transaction wrap toàn bộ (payment insert + order update + entitlement grant) — rollback nếu bất kỳ step fail
- Endpoint KHÔNG dùng JWT auth (verify bằng hash signature)

## 🧪 Test Hints (cho dev viết unit test — KHÔNG phải QC test plan)

- Amount mismatch → 04
- Pending order với code 00 → paid + enrollment created
- Pending order với code 24 (cancelled) → failed, no entitlement

Description:
# V44 — Monthly aggregate course revenue + session revenue per Tutor (SQL)

**Epic:** EP15  |  **Points:** 5  |  **Priority:** Medium

## 🎯 What to Build
Query SQL aggregate doanh thu Tutor theo tháng: course revenue + session revenue.

## 🛠 Implementation Tasks
- [ ] Service `PayoutsService.computeMonthlyAggregate(tutorId, periodMonth: 'YYYY-MM')`
- [ ] Returns:
```ts
{ courseRevenue: number; sessionRevenue: number; gross: number; }
```
- [ ] Course revenue SQL:
```sql
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(o.total), 0)
FROM orders o
JOIN course_enrollments e ON e.order_id = o.id
JOIN courses c ON c.id = e.course_id
WHERE c.tutor_id = :tutorId
  AND o.status = 'paid'
  AND to_char(o.paid_at, 'YYYY-MM') = :periodMonth;
```
- [ ] Session revenue SQL: tương tự nhưng JOIN session_bookings (parent for combo)
- [ ] Test với seed data: 5 Tutor, 30 orders paid

Description:
# V63 — EXCLUDE constraint chống double-booking (tsrange + btree_gist)

**Epic:** EP21  |  **Points:** 8  |  **Priority:** High

## 🎯 What to Build
Implement PostgreSQL EXCLUDE constraint chống Tutor double-book cùng khung giờ. Sử dụng `btree_gist` extension.

## 🛠 Implementation Tasks
- [ ] Migration:
```sql
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS btree_gist;

ALTER TABLE session_bookings
ADD CONSTRAINT no_overlap_per_tutor
EXCLUDE USING gist (
  tutor_id WITH =,
  tsrange(start_at, start_at + duration_hr * interval '1 hour') WITH &&
) WHERE (status IN ('assigned', 'confirmed', 'in_progress'));
```
- [ ] Update Hanah assign endpoint V31 catch error 23P01 (exclusion_violation) → return 409 CONFLICT_DOUBLE_BOOKING với message
- [ ] Test integration: insert 2 booking cùng tutor overlap → 2nd reject
- [ ] Test: 2 booking khác tutor cùng giờ → OK
- [ ] Test: 2 booking cùng tutor nhưng 1 cancelled → OK (cancelled không thuộc WHERE)

- `packages/db/prisma/migrations/0005_exclude_double_booking.sql`
